name: seo-page
description: > Single-page SEO audit: deep content quality evaluation using Google's E-E-A-T framework, Helpful Content guidelines, on-page SEO factors, search intent alignment, technical signals, and readability analysis. Fetches GSC performance data for that specific page, crawls the live HTML, evaluates metadata, schema markup, internal linking, content depth, and produces a scored report with actionable fixes. Use this skill whenever the user wants to analyze a specific page or URL — not the whole site.
author: nowork-studio
summary_zh: 这是一款单页面SEO诊断工具，能结合谷歌标准与GSC数据深度剖析网页并输出带优化建议的评分报告，适合只需对单个页面而非整站进行精细化排查的场景。
